name: HILLS BANCORPORATION
summary: Hills Bancorporation is an Iowa-based bank holding company operating through its subsidiary Hills Bank and Trust Company. The Bank provides full-service commercial banking including demand, savings, and time deposits; commercial, real estate, agricultural, and consumer loans; trust and estate administration; investment advisory services; farm management; and secondary market mortgage origination to individuals, businesses, governmental units, and institutional customers across Iowa.

products.name: Residential Real Estate Loans
products.description: First and junior lien loans on 1-4 family residences, including secondary market sales without retained servicing rights.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans for commercial properties with terms of one to five years and amortization up to 25 years.

products.name: Multi-family Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by apartment complexes and similar properties with fixed interest rates.

products.name: Construction Loans
products.description: Short-term loans for personal residences, land development, and commercial construction projects.

products.name: Agricultural Loans
products.description: Loans for farm operations, capital improvements, livestock, and machinery acquisitions.

products.name: Commercial and Financial Loans
products.description: Business loans including lines of credit for working capital and term loans for equipment acquisition.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Personal and automobile loans with shorter terms and lower balances.

products.name: Trust and Estate Services
products.description: Estate administration, personal trusts, pension plans, farm management, and investment advisory services.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: Demand, savings, and time deposit accounts serving as primary funding source for loans and investments.
